mapper.select:
select id, openid, record_id as recordId, stock_id as stockId, code, name, market, strategy, resonance, tags_json as tagsJson, entry_price as entryPrice, exit_price as exitPrice, added_at as addedAt, removed_at as removedAt, hold_days as holdDays, pnl_pct as pnlPct, remove_reason as removeReason from user_watch_history where openid = #{openid}
and pnl_pct > 0
and pnl_pct <= 0
order by removed_at desc limit 200
mapper.insert: insert into user_watch_history( openid, record_id, stock_id, code, name, market, strategy, resonance, tags_json, entry_price, exit_price, added_at, removed_at, hold_days, pnl_pct, remove_reason, create_time ) values ( #{openid}, #{recordId}, #{stockId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{market}, #{strategy}, #{resonance}, #{tagsJson}, #{entryPrice}, #{exitPrice}, #{addedAt}, #{removedAt}, #{holdDays}, #{pnlPct}, #{removeReason}, now() )
mapper.select: select count(*) from user_watch_history where openid = #{openid}
